en: How do you go to the block-house?
I drive to the block-house.
How does he go to the hospital?
He walks to the hospital.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by plane.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by boat.
How do you go home?
I go home by MRT.

ab: Ngua manemane ka Paelrese mua gaku.
en: How does Paelrese go to school?

ab: Ngua kisia ka Paelrese mua gaku.
en: Paelrese goes to school by train.

ab: Ngua manemaNe ka Kalrimadraw mua kiwkay?
en: How does Kalrimadraw go to church?

ab: Ngua lrilrikili ka Kalrimadraw mua kiwkay.
en: Kalrimadraw goes to church by bicycle.
Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Ini, ngua baasa ku mua gaku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.
Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Unu, ngua lrilrikila ku mua gaku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.
Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Unu, ngua kautia ku mua Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Ngua kisia ngua ngiapalay su mua Taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Ngua ngiapaladha ku, mariaridare ki kisia ngukay ki ngiapalay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Lu mua su kikway ngubaase ngiaungutingi su?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Ngia ungutinga ku mua kiwkay, masulialivate ki baase ngiaungutingi.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.
Is the market close to your house?

ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.
Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Adeethe, tinua daadavace madu si mua.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.
Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Sana mulatadrane tisiaba daadavace ka lrima pungukange si daruru.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
